## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up on the Homebase \<\> GrowthX engagement and discuss potential next steps to drive more impact.](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Explore opportunities to increase content production volume and test new content formats/channels](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Improve operational cadence and integration between GrowthX and Homebase content teams](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Potentially launch a newsletter play to drive more conversions from Homebase's large email list](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=2720.0)
  - [Leverage GrowthX for additional services like writer management, programmatic site builds after Webflow launch](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Operations

  - Currently producing \~12 articles/week at \<$0.10/word which is a good volume
  - [Need to clarify focus areas and allow GrowthX more flexibility to pivot content direction quickly based on insights](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [Opportunity to better integrate GrowthX as an extension of Homebase content team vs siloed tool](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Newsletter & Conversion Optimization

  - [Propose creating an automated newsletter with irresistible lead magnet offers to activate Homebase's large email database](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=2290.0)
  - [Leverage GrowthX's Beehive tool for high deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=2290.0)
  - [Even converting a small % could drive meaningful signups given Homebase's scale](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=2513.0)

### Additional GrowthX Services

  - [Open to leveraging GrowthX for writer management/bench if needed](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Explore programmatic site sections focused on key opportunities after Webflow relaunch](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adjust operating cadence for better integration (e.g. training, direct Sedera access)](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose newsletter/conversion rate optimization offering](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Discuss programmatic site opportunities to align with Webflow relaunch timing](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
  - [Explore additional GrowthX services like writer management as needed](https://fathom.video/share/EVYg3ymGrFqjHxWAHTvZvGs-D86gRwmX?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
